title: OptimisticPPI
description: Particle Player Invisible - Replaces invis particles with warning sings. Exclusive to OptimisticPvP Edition.
body:
# ⚠️ Particles Player Invisible (OptimisticPvP Edition)

Particles Player Invisible is a tactical utility resource pack designed to provide a significant advantage in competitive PvP scenarios. It completely reworks the invisibility effect visuals, turning a stealth advantage into a clear liability for your opponents.

## ✨ Features

High-Visibility Markers: Replaces subtle vanilla invisibility bubbles with bold, high-contrast Warning Icons.
Instant Detection: Track "invisible" players effortlessly, even in chaotic team fights or high-speed chases.
Anti-Stealth Meta: Specifically tuned for competitive modes where visibility is key to victory.

## 🔒 Requirements & Compatibility
[!IMPORTANT]

Exclusive Edition: This resource pack is designed specifically for the OptimisticPvP Edition modpack ecosystem.
It relies on internal configurations and specific mod dependencies found only within our official builds. It will not function correctly on vanilla clients or third-party modpacks.
🛠 How it Works
Instead of the standard entity_effect particles that are often hard to see against blocks or during the day, this pack injects custom warning textures that float above the invisible entity, making their position 100% clear at all times.

### 🚀 Part of the OptimisticPvP Ecosystem

This pack is a core component of our mission to provide the most optimized and competitive PvP experience.

Check out our other projects: [https://modrinth.com/organization/optimistic]

Join our community: [https://t.me/optimisticMC]
